The cashier can check which card has been charged by reading the last 4 digits of the card. However, one must always encourage the customer to tap only one card at a time. If wrong amount is keyed in the terminal, how can the transaction be rectified? The cashier will have to void the incorrect contactless transaction and proceed to a new transaction. The cashier will have to void the incorrect contactless transaction and proceed to a new transaction. If a customer has more than 1 contactless card in their wallet and they tap the wallet in front of the reader, would all contactless cards be charged? No. If the card reader senses more than 1 contactless card, it will ask to select any 1. The number of contactless cards sensed by the card reader depends on multiple factors. Customers should always take their contactless Visa card out of their wallet to tap & pay. No. If the card reader senses more than 1 contactless card, it will ask to select any 1. How can I get a contactless VISA card? Get in touch with your financial institution to see if contactless Visa card is an option for you. Get in touch with your financial institution to see if contactless Visa card is an option for you. Where can I use my card with contactless Visa card or my Visa Micro Tag? You can use contactless Visa card at any merchant displaying the contactless symbol on the terminal readers. You can use contactless Visa card at any merchant displaying the contactless symbol on the terminal readers. Are there any fees for using Visa contactless? Your financial institution should disclose any applicable fees during the application process. Your financial institution should disclose any applicable fees during the application process. Is my information safe when paying with contactless Visa card? Visa contactless transactions are just as secure as magnetic stripe transactions and are processed through the same reliable payment network. And, because you remain in control of your payment device during Visa contactless transactions, the risk of fraud is reduced.
